column3: To consult Allah through Istikhara prayer, and seek counsel from relevant people
To commit ro lifelong learning, seeking beneficial knowledge as an act of worship
To make dua and ask Allah for help in your daily affairs (big or small)
To exert sincere effor to remain in touch with your relatives
To seek the blessing of eating and sharing your meals with people and never eat alone
To remember Allah daily and in all prescribed timings/situations
To work on making thins things right between people who are in disagreement
To come back humbly to Allah and repent regularly for our sins
To link good intentions to your plans and have complete trust in Allah in the results
To be charitable and give abundantly, generously and consistently without fear of loss
To prioritize Salah (obligatory/voluntary) with calmness, tranquility, and presence throuout the day
To spend quality time with the Quran despite a busy schedule and overwhelming responsibilities
To seize the barakah in the early hours by starting the day early
To protect your heart by mastering your gaze and not direct your gaze at anything which is unlawful
To think before speaking and speak only when speech is better than silence
To be consious of people's needs and hsten to lend the helping hand before you are asked
To send abundant salawat upon the Prophet (PBUH) daily
